title: Natis System down at DLTC, Pacaltsdorp
description: GEORGE NEWS - The NATIS System is currently...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The NATIS System is currently down at the Traffic Services Department (DLTC) in Pacaltsdorp.


> The situation affects transactions and services at the DLTC.


Technicians are working on the problem and the public is asked to be patient.

For more information contact the Traffic Department in Pacaltsdorp on 044 878 2400.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
